title: Basic Principles of Hedging: A company anticipates receiving 1 million in foreign currency in...
summary: Analyze the mechanics and characteristics of futures contracts.
prompt: A company anticipates receiving $1 million in foreign currency in 4 months. Which type of derivative contract would be most suitable for hedging against exchange rate risk?

options.text: A forward contract would allow the company to lock in the exchange rate today
Difference between spot and futures prices

solution: A forward contract would allow the company to lock in the exchange rate today for the future receipt of foreign currency, effectively hedging against exchange rate fluctuations.
